name: Kidz On The Run
districts_or_customers: Boston-area schools (likely Boston Public Schools / private day schools - unconfirmed)
recent_news: No M&A or news identified; small Dorchester-based transportation operator appearing in business directories only.
fit_notes: Tiny urban Dorchester operator (~13-25 employees, sub-$1M to ~$2M revenue) — too small to be a meaningful tuck-in on its own, but could supplement an MA platform play if Summit pursues a Boston-cluster roll-up. Owner unconfirmed; warrants direct outreach to identify principals and fleet size.

name: H A Marston Inc
districts_or_customers: Pittsfield NH-area school district(s) (likely Pittsfield School District / surrounding SAUs - unconfirmed)
recent_news: No M&A news; FMCSA SAFER shows active private passenger carrier with 20 power units and 18 drivers (300K annual miles, 2023 data).
fit_notes: Long-standing (44-year-old) family-owned NH operator with ~20 buses — classic small tuck-in profile. Female-led/likely-family president suggests potential succession event. Strategically located in NH (a Summit state). Worth direct outreach to gauge owner age/succession.

name: W J K School Bus Conslnts LLC
employees_est: ~18 (per source data; not verified as bus drivers)
service_types: school transportation consulting (likely, not an operator)
recent_news: No M&A or operational news. Alan King is a CPA / former school district CFO (Harlingen ISD, Goose Creek ISD, Lewisville ISD, Dallas ISD; interim Superintendent at Dallas ISD) operating 'WJK School Business' as advisory entity from a residential Denton address.
fit_notes: NOT a viable tuck-in target. Entity name suggests 'school bus consultants' but evidence strongly indicates this is a school-finance/advisory LLC run by a former Texas school district CFO from a home address — not an operating school-bus contractor. Recommend excluding from buyer-funnel.

name: Rochester School Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Rochester Public Schools (ISD 535) - ~11,500 students daily over ~218 sq miles
recent_news: In 2024-2025 First Student sold its two Rochester MN facilities (incl. 3212 32nd Ave NW — the address in the dataset) to TFI Bus Portfolio LLC (JPMorgan Asset Management) for $10.86M and leased back for 15 years; First Student continues to operate the contract.
fit_notes: EXCLUDE — this is the First Student (EQT-owned) Rochester operating yard, not an independent operator. Real estate has been sold-leaseback to JPMorgan. Not a tuck-in candidate; potentially a competitive incumbent Summit would face in MN.

name: W R Ross School Bus Shop
districts_or_customers: La Cygne / Linn County KS-area district(s) (e.g., Prairie View USD 362 - inferred)
recent_news: Founder William 'Bill' Ralph Ross died June 3, 2024 at age 85; spouse Linda predeceased him in 2020. Affiliated Ross Transportation Inc (USDOT 589674) DOT number listed inactive — fleet ~21 buses (16 large, 5 small). Active succession event in progress.
fit_notes: HIGH-PRIORITY tuck-in candidate: founder Bill Ross passed June 2024 — clear succession trigger. ~21-bus rural KS family operator now likely run by son W. Kent Ross. Inactive USDOT raises questions about operational continuity — recommend immediate outreach to son to confirm status and explore acquisition/wind-down sale of routes and assets.
